decisions.briefing: Strong risk-on session with NASDAQ up 1.9% and S&P 500 up 1.1% — growth and momentum stocks are leading, which benefits the current portfolio's tilt toward mid/small-cap momentum names. Cash sits at $477, just under the $500 new-buy threshold, so no new positions are opened today despite having 4 open slots. All 6 existing positions remain held; the portfolio is well-positioned to capture today's bullish tailwind without taking on additional risk near all-time highs in several names.

market_education.summary_en: Markets surged in broad risk-on fashion today, with the NASDAQ outperforming the S&P 500 nearly 2-to-1 (+1.9% vs +1.1%), signaling strong institutional rotation into technology, AI infrastructure, and high-growth names. This kind of NASDAQ-led divergence typically reflects renewed confidence in rate-sensitive growth stocks, often triggered by softer inflation data or dovish Fed commentary. Momentum buying accelerated through the session as short-sellers covered positions and retail flows chased the move higher.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場呈現全面風險偏好格局，納斯達克指數漲幅幾乎達標普500的兩倍（分別上漲1.9%與1.1%），顯示機構資金大舉輪動至科技、人工智慧基礎設施及高成長股票。此類以納指領漲的背離走勢，通常反映市場對利率敏感型成長股的信心回升，往往由通脹數據走軟或聯儲局偏鴿派言論所觸發。動能買盤貫穿整個交易日，空頭回補加上散戶追漲，共同推動指數攀升。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: When the NASDAQ significantly outperforms the S&P 500 on a given day — like today's +1.9% vs +1.1% — it signals that investors are specifically rotating into technology and growth stocks rather than buying the broad market equally. The NASDAQ is heavily weighted toward mega-cap tech and AI names, so its outperformance tells you where the 'smart money' is flowing. Tracking this divergence helps identify which sectors are leading and whether a rally has broad or narrow participation.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 當納斯達克指數的單日漲幅明顯超越標普500時——如今日的1.9%對比1.1%——代表投資者正選擇性地輪動至科技與成長股，而非全面買入大盤。納斯達克重倉科技巨頭及人工智慧概念股，其跑贏大盤的走勢反映「聰明錢」的流向。追蹤兩指數的背離幅度，有助於判斷哪些板塊正在領漲，以及當前的升市是否具備足夠廣度。
